title: Cobblemon Spawn Randomizer
description: Cobblemon Addon randomizing the spawns of every Pokémon
body:
Cobblemon can get a bit boring at times, so what better way to revive your Minecraft world than through randomizing the spawns of every single Pokémon?

Introducing Cobblemon Spawn Randomizer, an addon that randomizes every single Pokémon spawn ever! You might find a level 100 Voltorb, or a level 10 Xerneas, it's all random! This addon also works with water, fishing, and fossil restoration spawns, randomizing them as well!

![Pack Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db258978481fc99901eb2da8f0d140a6bb50b8ff.png)
